raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX approved and granted a refund for this transaction on XX/XX/year>. I have written confirmation stating We have granted your claim and issued you a refund to your original payment method. 

The refund was never credited to my Citi account. 

This is not a delivery dispute. The merchant accepted responsibility and approved the refund, but failed to issue the credit. XXXX later provided contradictory information stating the order was delivered, despite previously approving the refund. 

Citibank closed my dispute holding me responsible without addressing the fact that the merchant-approved refund was never received. 

I am requesting that Citibank reopen this case under Merchant Credit Not Received and coordinate directly with the merchant to provide proof of refund issuance or reversal. Dispute # XXXX
